entries.definition: A large piece or lump of something (e.g., a hunk of bread or meat).
entries.exampleSentence: She tore off a hunk of bread and handed it to him.

entries.definition: An attractive, well-built person (usually used of a man).
entries.exampleSentence: He's a bit of a hunk — everyone noticed him at the party.

entries.definition: A contiguous block of changes in a diff output (often called a 'hunk' in patch/diff tools).
entries.exampleSentence: The patch contained three hunks: two small fixes and one large refactor.
